title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Byju's International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Byju's International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Byju's International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Byju's International Enterprises:
Byju's International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's International Enterprises!
